parameters.jsCode:
const villes = $input.all().map(i => i.json); const emailDest = villes[0]?.email; const dateStr = new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); const fmt = n => (n != null ? Number(n).toLocaleString('fr-FR') : 'N/A'); const fmtEur = n => (n != null ? `${Number(n).toFixed(2).replace('.', ',')} EUR` : 'N/A'); const barPct = (depense, alloue) => { const pct = Math.min(100, (depense / alloue * 100)); const color = pct > 80 ? '#dc2626' : pct > 50 ? '#f59e0b' : '#16a34a'; return `
${pct.toFixed(1)}%`; }; let html = ` Analyse Meta JOF/JMW

Analyse Performance Meta Ads

Japan Otaku Festival / Japan Manga Wave - ${dateStr}

${villes.map(v => `
${v.ville}
${v.campagnes.length} campagne${v.campagnes.length > 1 ? 's' : ''}
${barPct(v.budget.depense, v.budget.alloue)}
Depense: ${fmtEur(v.budget.depense)} / ${fmtEur(v.budget.alloue)}
`).join('')}
`; for (const v of villes) { const stopCount = v.campagnes.filter(c => c.action.includes('Stopper')).length; const boostCount = v.campagnes.filter(c => c.action.includes('Augmenter') || c.action.includes('Relancer')).length; html += `

${v.ville}

Categorie Donnees Action a mener
Audience FB: ${fmt(v.audience.fb)} / IG: ${v.audience.ig != null ? fmt(v.audience.ig) : 'Pas de compte'} ${v.audience.action}
Budget Alloue ${fmtEur(v.budget.alloue)} -
Budget Depense ${fmtEur(v.budget.depense)} ${v.budget.action}
Budget Restant ${fmtEur(v.budget.restant)} -
${stopCount > 0 || boostCount > 0 ? `
${stopCount > 0 ? `
${stopCount} campagne${stopCount > 1 ? 's' : ''} a stopper
` : ''} ${boostCount > 0 ? `
${boostCount} campagne${boostCount > 1 ? 's' : ''} a booster
` : ''}
` : ''} ${v.campagnes.map((c, i) => ``).join('')}
Campagne Vues Couverture Clics CTR Interactions Depense Action
${c.nom} ${fmt(c.impressions)} ${fmt(c.reach)} ${fmt(c.clics)} ${c.ctr}% ${fmt(c.interactions)} ${fmtEur(c.spend)} ${c.action}
`; } html += `
Genere automatiquement par OpsFlow - ${new Date().toISOString()}
`; const subject = `[JOF/JMW] Analyse Meta Ads - ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR')}`; return [{ json: { html, subject, email: emailDest } }];
